0 - automatic, 1 - by mouse movement, 2: 0 - automatic, 1 - by mouse movement, 2 - by movement keys, 3 - by inverse mouse movement
0 - by relative enemy position, 1 - by i: 0 - by relative enemy position, 1 - by inverse mouse movement, 2 - by mouse movement, 3 - by movement keys
0 - custom, 1 - low, 2 - medium, 3 - hig: 0 - custom, 1 - low, 2 - medium, 3 - high, 4 - very high
0 - filtering disabled, 1 - nearest, 2 -: 0 - filtering disabled, 1 - nearest, 2 - linear interpolation, 3 - anisotropic
0 - never, 1 - ranged only, 2 - melee on: 0 - never, 1 - ranged only, 2 - melee only, 3 - always
0 - none, 1 - on group, 2 - on friendlie: 0 - none, 1 - on group, 2 - on friendlies, 3 - on everyone
0 - none, 1 - own, 2 - all, 3 - player d: 0 - none, 1 - own, 2 - all, 3 - player deaths, 4 - own kills and player deaths
0 - slowest, 1 - slower, 2 - normal, 3 -: 0 - slowest, 1 - slower, 2 - normal, 3 - faster, 5 - fastest. Operations: options_get_combat_speed, options_set_combat_speed.
AI will take into consideration what eac: AI will take into consideration what each directional attack’s damage will be when deciding what attack to use.

Added missile damage to weapons damage f: Added missile damage to weapons damage for any ranged weapons. Otherwise only for bows and crossbows.

Advanced Turn Rate Formula For Melee: Advanced Turn Rate Formula For Melee
Affects agent's ai. 0 - good, 1 - averag: Affects agent's ai. 0 - good, 1 - average, 2 - poor.  Operations: options_get_combat_ai, options_set_combat_ai.
Affects hit sound for melee weapon.
Affects items with the flag itp_is_pike: Affects items with the flag itp_is_pike and is used for rotation speed limiting while bracing spears (e.g. in NW). If the turning acceleration is less than 0.01 or the set value (whichever is higher) the game engine plays the pike crouch animation (anim_crouch_pike) and otherwise the crouch staff animation (anim_crouch_staff). You can obviously not give a value below the default one of 0.01 and if you provide a big value (it seems like 0.5 is enough) you can completely override the canceling effect.
Ai Decide Direction According To Damage: Ai Decide Direction According To Damage
All FMOD_SOFTWARE (and FMOD_HARDWARE on: All FMOD_SOFTWARE (and FMOD_HARDWARE on 3DS and NGP) with FMOD_3D based voices will add a software lowpass filter effect into the DSP chain which causes sounds to sound duller when the sound goes behind the listener.

All FMOD_SOFTWARE (and FMOD_HARDWARE on 3DS and NGP) with FMOD_3D based voices will add a software lowpass filter effect into the DSP chain which is automatically used when Channel::set3DOcclusion is used or the geometry API.
All FMOD_SOFTWARE with FMOD_3D based voi: All FMOD_SOFTWARE with FMOD_3D based voices will add a software lowpass and highpass filter effect into the DSP chain which will act as a distance-automated bandpass filter.
Allows the mod to ’force’ particles. Use: Allows the mod to ’force’ particles. Used if the particles are important in the module and the player should not disable them.
Amount of units (in centimeters) that th: Amount of units (in centimeters) that the render plane extends out from the camera inside of scenes.
An extension only available in Windows V: An extension only available in Windows Vista and newer.
Angle used to determine the flow directi: Angle used to determine the flow direction of the river shader for the world map.
Angle, this is where the tear artefact i: Angle, this is where the tear artefact is visible on the sea.
Antialiasing (FXAA). Smooths out jagged: Antialiasing (FXAA). Smooths out jagged edges, significantly blurs the screen. 0 - none, 1 - low, 2 - medium, 3 - high.
Antialiasing (MSAA). Smooths out jagged: Antialiasing (MSAA). Smooths out jagged edges on solid objects.
Apply blow force to beaten on corpses.
Apply proficiency, power strike and stre: Apply proficiency, power strike and strength to couching damage.
Async Render Calls Critical Section Spin: Async Render Calls Critical Section Spin Count
Auto Exposure mimics how the human eye a: Auto Exposure mimics how the human eye adjusts in varying levels of darkness.
Automatically splits the console command: Automatically splits the console command by spaces and puts strings into registers for wse_console_command_received script.
Background mesh for multiplayer log wind: Background mesh for multiplayer log window.
Blows is beaten on corpses and thus prev: Blows is beaten on corpses and thus prevents an unintentional teamhits.
Can Use Scene Props In Single Player: Can Use Scene Props In Single Player

Changed knockdown formula, more chance w: Changed knockdown formula, more chance when hitting legs or head.
Changed stagger formula for thrown, bow: Changed stagger formula for thrown, bow and crossbow, more chance when hitting legs.
Changes formula for moving speed while r: Changes formula for moving speed while reloading for more effect from reloadable weapon proficiency.
Changes the algorithm of random equipmen: Changes the algorithm of random equipment for troops and does not take into account the value of the item.
Changes the network protocol for enable: Changes the network protocol for enable some advanced WSE features like composite network messages and more skins in multiplayer.

Defines the boundaries of day and night: Defines the boundaries of day and night time.
Deprecated. 0 - good, 1 - average, 2 - p: Deprecated. 0 - good, 1 - average, 2 - poor. Operations: options_get_campaign_ai, options_set_campaign_ai, game_get_reduce_campaign_ai.
Depth of Field is a post-processing effe: Depth of Field is a post-processing effect that simulates the focus properties of a camera lens.
Determines how agility and athletics aff: Determines how agility and athletics affect running speed.
Determines how much damage is required t: Determines how much damage is required to crush through overhead blocks on weapons with the appropriate flag itp_crush_through.
Determines if AI agents can cause friend: Determines if AI agents can cause friendly fire.
Determines if Custom Battle appears on t: Determines if Custom Battle appears on the main menu.
Determines if Join a Campaign appears on: Determines if Join a Campaign appears on the Multiplayer menu.
Determines if Multiplayer appears on the: Determines if Multiplayer appears on the main menu.
Determines if New Game and Load Game app: Determines if New Game and Load Game appear on main menu.
Determines if Tutorial appears on the ma: Determines if Tutorial appears on the main menu.
Determines if a party’s id value is show: Determines if a party’s id value is show above them instead of their name. Change to true for ease in module development.
Determines if ai agent can reload crossb: Determines if ai agent can reload crossbows while running or walking. Does not affect horseback. Needs bUseCrossbowAsFirearm to be enabled as well. Also limits movement speed when reloading for both ai and players.
Determines if an agent can jumping while: Determines if an agent can jumping while melee attack.
Determines if an agent can jumping while ranged attack.
Determines if an agent can jumping while throwing attack.
Determines if an agent can melee attack: Determines if an agent can melee attack while jumping.
Determines if an agent can ranged attack: Determines if an agent can ranged attack while jumping.
Determines if an agent can throwing atta: Determines if an agent can throwing attack while jumping.
Determines if block directions are synce: Determines if block directions are synced between client and server.
Determines if horses rear upon being str: Determines if horses rear upon being struck with enough damage with thrust polearm blow.
Determines if human agents can crouch. D: Determines if human agents can crouch. Different values on client and server break network compatibility due to replication.
Determines if party names on the world m: Determines if party names on the world map will show their faction color.
Determines if player in singleplayer can: Determines if player in singleplayer can interact with scene_props like in multiplayer (using doors and drawbridges for example).
Determines if ragdolls are synced betwee: Determines if ragdolls are synced between client and server.
Determines if reloading can be done in s: Determines if reloading can be done in steps. That means if your reload has been interrupted, you’ll start from the begining of the phase at which the reload was stopped. Phased reload works if you use itcf_reload_musket or itcf_reload_pistol for the ranged weapon.
Determines if riderless horse agents wil: Determines if riderless horse agents will try to get away from aggressive agents.
Determines if scene props can emit sound: Determines if scene props can emit sounds inside a scene. Different values on client and server break network compatibility and cause a crash.
Determines if shield skill affects shiel: Determines if shield skill affects shield's area of protection.
Determines if the game saves inventories: Determines if the game saves inventories for regular troops (i.e. not heroes) too. Also, savegames will be a bit bigger.
Determines if the mod shows the troop up: Determines if the mod shows the troop upgrade button.
Determines if the module uses Native’s a:
Determines if the module uses Native’s advanced formations. Those add extensions to the order menus related to formations and weapon usage.
Players can then let the troops line up from one row to five rows and order their archers to fire at their command. Some lines need to be added to ui.csv for this.
Determines if the player can use gk_came: Determines if the player can use gk_camera_closer and gk_camera_farther to adjust the default camera position.
Determines if the players on a multiplay: Determines if the players on a multiplayer server can use gk_walk to walk instead of run.
Determines if the player’s gold is shown: Determines if the player’s gold is shown in multiplayer.
Determines if your module allows case in: Determines if your module allows case insensitive references to mesh names i.e. sword_a and Sword_a being treated as the same reference.
Determines minimum inflicted damage at w: Determines minimum inflicted damage at which the polearm causes horses rear.
Determines minimum lenght for polearm ca: Determines minimum lenght for polearm causes horses rear.
Determines the amount and velocity of bl: Determines the amount and velocity of blood particle effects.
Determines the amount which will be dire: Determines the amount which will be directly subtracted from blunt damage due to armor.
Determines the amount which will be directly subtracted from cut damage due to armor.
Determines the amount which will be directly subtracted from pierce damage due to armor.
Determines the eastern and northern boun: Determines the eastern and northern bounds of the world map. The map can continue past this, but parties will not be able to travel past this boundary.
Determines the minimum hitpoints needed: Determines the minimum hitpoints needed for heroes to appear in battles and contribute to party skills.
Determines the minimum number of hitpoin: Determines the minimum number of hitpoints a player must have to appear in battles and contribute to party skills.
Determines the necessary speed of the ho: Determines the necessary speed of the horse at which the polearm causes horses rear.
Determines the percentage reduction from: Determines the percentage reduction from the blunt damage.
Determines the percentage reduction from the cut damage.
Determines the percentage reduction from the pierce damage.
Determines the visibility of the weapon: Determines the visibility of the weapon proficiency inside the character menu, but the weapons and the ability to use them still exists in the game.
Determines the western and southern boun: Determines the western and southern bounds of the world map. The map can continue past this, but parties will not be able to travel past this boundary.
Determines whether crossbows will fire w: Determines whether crossbows will fire with smoke and a sound of explosion or with normal crossbow sound. Allow players reload crossbows while running or walking.
Determines whether or not automatically: Determines whether or not automatically search through all troops/factions/towns to check if they have note text.
Determines whether or not the player can: Determines whether or not the player can use gk_zoom to narrow the camera’s field of vision. Operation: is_zoom_disabled.
Determines whether to use Direct3 D9 Ex: Determines whether to use Direct3 D9 Ex If Available.
Determines whether to use Horse Slope Fo: Determines whether to use Horse Slope For Rider Position.
Determines whether to use Low Variation: Determines whether to use Low Variation Cache.
Determines whether to use r Agent.
Different values on client and server br: Different values on client and server break network compatibility (different size of number in bits). So put this value in the settings of your module and not only to server. Range: 2-1000. Operation: get_max_players.
Disables the TAB end in conversations.
Dismount when looking at a horse and pre: Dismount when looking at a horse and pressing gk_action.
Drop all item on death or only wielded.
Enable support for more than two multipl: Enable support for more than two multiplayer skins for profile.
Enables fake character shadows (shadows: Enables fake character shadows (shadows that are cast on collision meshes).
Enables or disables Log Window Backgroun: Enables or disables Log Window Background.
End ragdoll, when agent on ground and th: End ragdoll, when agent on ground and this time has passed.
End ragdoll, when ragdoll inactive and t: End ragdoll, when ragdoll inactive and this time has passed.
End ragdoll, when this time has passed.
Executes a task on a separate thread. So: Executes a task on a separate thread. Solves the cpu bottleneck.
Extent of the observable game world that: Extent of the observable game world that is seen on the display at any given moment for first person. Range: 55.0-100.0
Extent of the observable game world that is seen on the display at any given moment for third person. Range: 55.0-100.0
Fake Character Shadow Shader High Qualit: Fake Character Shadow Shader High Quality
Fake Character Shadow Slope Scaled Depth: Fake Character Shadow Slope Scaled Depth Bias
Fix Warband bug where the combat log dis: Fix Warband bug where the combat log disappears from the screen if too much information is being written out too quickly.
Flushes the profiling file stream every: Flushes the profiling file stream every x sec (only flushes on exit if 0).
For multiplayer if an agent is release m: For multiplayer if an agent is release melee overswing or thrust attack instead default limit of the rotational speed use formula taking into account the type of weapon, the weight and length of the weapon.
For multiplayer if an agent is stabbing: For multiplayer if an agent is stabbing or doing an overhead attack then the limit of the rotational speed will be set to 11 instead 16.
For small enough meshes, this transforms: For small enough meshes, this transforms their vertices on the CPU, groups similar vertices together, and renders them in one draw call. Requires "Combine meshes" or "Combine low-poly meshes" flag for material in brf.
Hide servers running other mods from the: Hide servers running other mods from the servers list.
High dynamic range (HDR) is a technique: High dynamic range (HDR) is a technique that produces images with a greater dynamic range of luminosity than standard dynamic range (SDR) images, allowing for realistic depictions of color and brightness. 0 - off, 1 - low, 2 - high
Horse charge friendly fire for singlepla: Horse charge friendly fire for singleplayer. Operation: set_horse_friendly_fire.
Horseback Slash Polearm Usable Only With: Horseback Slash Polearm Usable Only Without Shield
In milliseconds, to receive a response t: In milliseconds, to receive a response to a request.
In milliseconds, to use for name resolut: In milliseconds, to use for name resolution.
In milliseconds, to use for sending requ: In milliseconds, to use for sending requests.
In milliseconds, to use for server conne: In milliseconds, to use for server connection requests.
In-game cheats, useful for mod developme: In-game cheats, useful for mod development. Operations: is_cheat_mode_enabled, options_get_cheat_mode, options_set_cheat_mode.
Item Speed Affect Speed Bonus For Damage: Item Speed Affect Speed Bonus For Damage
Item speed for melee weapon affects spee: Item speed for melee weapon affects speed bonus for damage calculation.
Keeps ships at sea for sea-to-sea routes: Keeps ships at sea for sea-to-sea routes.
Limit for particle mesh vertices. range:: Limit for particle mesh vertices. range: 0-65536
Logs ip with player's connect and discon: Logs ip with player's connect and disconnect.
Makes agents take into account a weapon’: Makes agents take into account a weapon’s length when choosing a weapon at their inventory.
Max Action Progress For Ally Collision: Max Action Progress For Ally Collision
Max Action Progress For Prop Collision O: Max Action Progress For Prop Collision Overswing
Max Action Progress For Prop Collision S: Max Action Progress For Prop Collision Swing Left
Max Action Progress For Prop Collision Swing Right

Maximum amount of companions in the play: Maximum amount of companions in the player party without leadership skill.
Maximum amount of zoom out on the world: Maximum amount of zoom out on the world map.
Merges meshes with the same name.
Method that renders multiple copies of a: Method that renders multiple copies of a mesh with the same material in a single draw call. Each copy of the mesh is called an instance. This is useful for drawing things that appear multiple times in a scene, for example, trees or bushes.
Min Action Progress For Ally Collision: Min Action Progress For Ally Collision
Min Action Progress For Prop Collision O: Min Action Progress For Prop Collision Overswing
Min Action Progress For Prop Collision S: Min Action Progress For Prop Collision Swing Left
Min Action Progress For Prop Collision Swing Right

Min Soaked Damage For High Armor Hit: Min Soaked Damage For High Armor Hit
Min Time For Successful Auto Restart: Min Time For Successful Auto Restart
Minimum amount of zoom out on the world: Minimum amount of zoom out on the world map.
Missiles with (damage > shield_penetrati: Missiles with (damage > shield_penetration_offset + shield_penetration_factor * shield) will penetrate a shield and cause damage to the wielder.
Modders may adjust these large enough so: Modders may adjust these large enough so that the game will not need to restore buffers during the game. However keeping them excessively large will reduce performance in most systems.
More Proficiency Effect For Moving Speed: More Proficiency Effect For Moving Speed While Reloading
More Skins Support For Multiplayer Profi: More Skins Support For Multiplayer Profile
Moveable physics on all scene props; no: Moveable physics on all scene props; no sokf_moveable flag will be needed.
Multiplier factor for additional damage: Multiplier factor for additional damage penalty  for polearm with mount.
Multiplier factor for additional damage penalty  for polearm with shield.
Multiplier factor for additional damage penalty  for two handed property with mount.
Multiplier factor for additional damage penalty  for two handed property with shield.

Multiplier factor for damage penalty  for two handed and polearm with shield.
Multiplier of the spotting skill, affect: Multiplier of the spotting skill, affects the visibility radius.
Multiplier of the tracking skill. If set: Multiplier of the tracking skill. If set to 0 no tracking marks will appear at the world map no matter the skill.
Multiplier of the wound treatment skill: Multiplier of the wound treatment skill for hero.
Multiplier of the wound treatment skill for main party hero.
Multiplier of the wound treatment skill for main party regular troops.
Multiplier of the wound treatment skill for player.
Multiplier of the wound treatment skill for regular troops.
Mutes warnings during msfiles folder sca: Mutes warnings during msfiles folder scanning for lua.
Number of messages in battle. Value 4 -: Number of messages in battle. Value 4 - about 10 messages. It may be confusing, but the formula is linear, so it's not hard to figure out the number of rows you need.
On Demand Texture Force Check Period: On Demand Texture Force Check Period
Once you start mission, it’s unload all: Once you start mission, it’s unload all scenes from RAM.
Open game protocol for quering server in: Open game protocol for quering server info.

Path where WSE created files are stored: Path where WSE created files are stored (empty for default).
Pause game when window minimized, does n: Pause game when window minimized, does not recommend for multiplayer, because disconnect from server due to timeout.
Post Processing Filter. 0 - none, 1 - Li: Post Processing Filter. 0 - none, 1 - Light Sharpen, 2 - Strong Sharpen, 3 - MAKE MY EYES BLEED
Prevents a restart loop if the server cr: Prevents a restart loop if the server crashes on startup.
Prevents screen tearing, can cause input: Prevents screen tearing, can cause input lag.
Quick download of server's custom maps f: Quick download of server's custom maps from external storage.
R C O N Server Password: R C O N Server Password
R C O N Server Port: R C O N Server Port
Random multiplier range for soaked and r: Random multiplier range for soaked and reduced damage 0.7 - 0.75 instead 0.45 - 1.0.
Range: 1.0-2.0. Setting speed_power to 2: Range: 1.0-2.0. Setting speed_power to 2.0 makes damage scale with the square of missile’s speed. You can set it to 1.0 to make it scale linearly.
Range: 1.0-2.0. Setting speed_power to 2.0 makes damage scale with the square of weapon’s speed. You can set it to 1.0 to make it scale linearly.
Reduces blur on distant surfaces. Values: Reduces blur on distant surfaces. Values: 0, 2, 4, 8, 16.
Reduces variation of cached meshes (poss: Reduces variation of cached meshes (possibly improving performance) in modules with two skins (male, female) only.
Remove dead server from favorites after: Remove dead server from favorites after this num search tries.
Remove dead server from favorites after this time.
Render Buffer Critical Section Spin Coun: Render Buffer Critical Section Spin Count
Render Thread Critical Section Spin Coun: Render Thread Critical Section Spin Count
Required aiming animation progress for t: Required aiming animation progress for the shot is shorter for pistols, same as for muskets and crossbows. Otherwise only for muskets and crossbows.
Returns xml by default. Can be overridde: Returns xml by default. Can be overridden using wse_get_server_info script.
Rotate the agent in the direction of vie: Rotate the agent in the direction of view in singleplayer, just like in multiplayer.
Same, if cheat mode slow-motion enabled.
Scale charge damage inflicted by horses: Scale charge damage inflicted by horses when ramming into human agents.
Scene editor, some debug features. Be wa: Scene editor, some debug features. Be warned, this slows down the game. Operations: is_edit_mode_enabled, edit_mode_set_enabled.
Seconds required before a broken shield: Seconds required before a broken shield is removed from the scene. Setting it to 0 will prevent the items from despawning during a mission.
Seconds required before a dropped item i: Seconds required before a dropped item is removed from the scene. Setting it to 0 will prevent the items from despawning during a mission.
Seconds required before a fired arrow is: Seconds required before a fired arrow is removed from the scene. Setting it to 0 will prevent the items from despawning during a mission.
Set difficulty requirement for item type: Set difficulty requirement for item types (check attributes in header_troops.py and skills in header_skills.py).
Set the drag coefficient for bullets.
Set to true if you don’t have extra hair: Set to true if you don’t have extra hair textures. Each human skin definition in Native uses hair_blonde along with vertex coloring. If you set the value to false the game expects to find for example a material and texture named hair_red, beard_black, etc.
Sets how many additional prisoners per p: Sets how many additional prisoners per prisoner management skill point the player can have in his party.
Sets how many additional troops per lead: Sets how many additional troops per leadership skill point the player can have in his party.
Sets how many attribute points are gaine: Sets how many attribute points are gained per level.
Sets how many attribute points are requi: Sets how many attribute points are required per skill level.
Sets how many skill points are gained pe: Sets how many skill points are gained per level.

Sets the maximum distance the camera can: Sets the maximum distance the camera can be from the terrain in the world map.
Sets the maximum number of auto batch me: Sets the maximum number of auto batch mesh vertices allowed.

Sets the minimum distance the camera can: Sets the minimum distance the camera can be from the terrain in the world map.
Sets the minimum number of agents for na: Sets the minimum number of agents for nav mesh reuse allowed.
Sets the multiplier for EXP needed for t: Sets the multiplier for EXP needed for troop to upgrade.
Sets the spin count for the async render: Sets the spin count for the async render calls critical section critical section.
Sets the spin count for the network crit: Sets the spin count for the network critical section critical section.
Sets the spin count for the render buffe: Sets the spin count for the render buffer critical section critical section.
Sets the spin count for the render threa: Sets the spin count for the render thread critical section critical section.
Sets the spin count for the specified cr: Sets the spin count for the specified critical section. Spinning means that when a thread tries to acquire a critical section that is locked, the thread enters a loop, checks to see if the lock is released, and if the lock is not released, the thread goes to sleep.
Sets the spin count for the task critica: Sets the spin count for the task critical section critical section.

Sets the xp multiplier heroes gain by ki: Sets the xp multiplier heroes gain by killing an enemy.

Show crosshair for singleplayer. Operati: Show crosshair for singleplayer. Operation: set_show_crosshair.
Size of a socket's receive buffer.
Size of a socket's send buffer.
Sound occlusion in games refers to a pro: Sound occlusion in games refers to a process that imitates how sounds are perceived in "closed" environments, closed meaning that there are barriers close to the sound source or listener. It's can drop performance dramatically with a large number of agents or other sound sources.
Source rcon protocol for remote console: Source rcon protocol for remote console commands.
Specifies if Multiplayer Campaign is ava: Specifies if Multiplayer Campaign is available or enabled.

Speed modifier for the horses that have: Speed modifier for the horses that have the imod_meek modifier
Speed modifier for the horses that have the imod_timid modifier.
Speed with which time passes on the map: Speed with which time passes on the map screen. With 0.25 as default value 1 GAME hour is 4 seconds of REAL time.
Squared range for kick, so 0.16 means 0.4 meters.

The distance at which the number of burs: The distance at which the number of bursted particles decreases. range: 10.0-60.0
The maximum value for a visual display o: The maximum value for a visual display of the size of the battle, depending on fBattleSize.
The minimum server uptime at which a res: The minimum server uptime at which a restart is considered successful and the restart counter is reset.
The minimum value for a visual display o: The minimum value for a visual display of the size of the battle, depending on fBattleSize.
The time during which the particles are: The time during which the particles are accumulated (not burst every frame).

Time step for advancement state of ragdo: Time step for advancement state of ragdoll simulation. Operation - set_physics_delta_time.
Toggles the visibility of Attack Directi: Toggles the visibility of Attack Direction.
Toggles the visibility of Frame Rate.
Toggles the visibility of Multiplayer Ch: Toggles the visibility of Multiplayer Chat.

Total number of hints visible on the sec: Total number of hints visible on the secondary loading screen.
Transparency Antialiasing (MSAA). Smooth: Transparency Antialiasing (MSAA). Smooths out jagged edges on semi-transparent objects.
Use Direct3 D9 Ex If Available: Use Direct3 D9 Ex If Available
Use Horse Slope For Rider Position: Use Horse Slope For Rider Position
Use anisotropic instead linear interpola: Use anisotropic instead linear interpolation for min filter. Limit for anisotropic filtering - 4.
Use dynamic banner transparency dependin: Use dynamic banner transparency depending on distance or fixed.
Use missile (arrow, bolt, bullet) damage: Use missile (arrow, bolt, bullet) damage type (cut, pierce, blunt) instead of launcher item (bow, crossbow, musket, pistol) damage type.
Used for ai agent compute path.
Used for animation progress with arf_use: Used for animation progress with arf_use_inv_walk_progress or arf_use_walk_progress flags.
Used for announce console command and ot: Used for announce console command and other WSE2 server notifications since Warband doesn't have a hardcoded event for that purpose. 111 for Native and VC, 105 for NW. For other modules check header_common.py and search multiplayer_event_show_server_message or similar.
Used in conjunction with itp_extra_penet: Used in conjunction with itp_extra_penetration to determine at what level extra penetration is reduced by armor.
Used in conjunction with itp_extra_penetration to determine at what level extra penetration is soaked by armor.
Used in conjunction with shield_penetrat: Used in conjunction with shield_penetration_offset to determine if a missile can penetrate a shield.
Used server-side for lock fov for all WS: Used server-side for lock fov for all WSE2 players to default 75.
Used to determine the flow speed of the: Used to determine the flow speed of the ocean shader for the world map.
Used to determine the flow speed of the river shader for the world map.
Used to insure parties cannot disband on: Used to insure parties cannot disband on certain tiles (Like passable water).
Used to select a entity lod depending on: Used to select a entity lod depending on distance. Range: 0.0-1.0.
Uses a ragdoll with shot force when kill: Uses a ragdoll with shot force when killing an agent with a crossbow, musket, or pistol on a non-hand and non-leg hit. Operations - options_get_realistic_headshots, options_set_realistic_headshots.
Uses advanced log format instead standar: Uses advanced log format instead standart Warband's. More convenient for parsing logs.
Uses the party icon model to determine p: Uses the party icon model to determine party radius. Especially important for modules with large town icons as it allows parties to interact with them in expected locations, as opposed to the center of the icon.

Vertices limit for mesh with \"Combine l: Vertices limit for mesh with "Combine low-poly meshes" material flag.
Water reflections mode. Full reflections: Water reflections mode. Full reflections are performance heavy. Disable them if you are experiencing low frame rates. 0 - disable, 1 - sky, 2 - sky and landscape objects, 3 - full (perfomance heavy)
Weapon trails with motion blur. 0 - none: Weapon trails with motion blur. 0 - none, 1 - partial, 2 - full
When this limit is reached, deletes the: When this limit is reached, deletes the oldest prunable mission object.
When you first start the game sets certa: When you first start the game sets certain settings depending on the configuration of the PC.
When you try to connect to a server for: When you try to connect to a server for which there is no module in the game, it offers to download it from this link.
Whether to take into account speed of sh: Whether to take into account speed of shooter agent together with speed of missile to calculate damage of missile, or only speed of missile.
Win32 Vista only - for WASAPI output - E: Win32 Vista only - for WASAPI output - Enable exclusive access to hardware, lower latency at the expense of excluding other applications from accessing the audio hardware.
With crushthrough for attack power use m: With crushthrough for attack power use multiplier from range 0.7 - 0.8 instead 0.4 - 0.6.
Works only if Direct3D9Ex is enabled. Th: Works only if Direct3D9Ex is enabled. The maximum number of back buffer frames that a driver can queue. The value defaults to 3, but can range from 1 to 16. A value of 0 will reset latency to the default.
You can override list of videos for your: You can override list of videos for your module by specifying a relative path to module folder for them.
msg_confirm_remove: Are you sure you want to delete {name}?
msg_launcher_update: A launcher update is available! Do you want to download and install it?
msg_restart_now: Update downloaded. Restart now to apply?
set to TRUE to initialize all locals var: set to TRUE to initialize all locals variables with zeros, FALSE will give better performance
ui_offline: No Internet Connection. Some features may be unavailable.
use D3DTADDRESS_BORDER instead D3DTADDRE: use D3DTADDRESS_BORDER instead D3DTADDRESS_CLAMP for shadow map sampler
